name: Rio Transport LLC
owner_or_parent: Likely affiliated with Senior Express Transportation (West Allis, WI) owned by Brian & Veronica Kehlnhofer; FMCSA USDOT 3152807 lists Rio Transport LLC as a property/motor vehicle hauler
service_types: NEMT/senior/special-needs transport (per Senior Express affiliation); FMCSA filing categorizes as property carrier for motor vehicle hauling - conflicting profiles
districts_or_customers: Greater Milwaukee area (My Choice WI, Veyo/MTM, UnitedHealthcare via Senior Express); no school district contracts identified
recent_news: 2016: Brian and Veronica Kehlnhofer purchased Senior Express Transportation from Greg Cerfus (BizTimes Milwaukee); no recent M&A news for Rio Transport LLC
website: seniorexpresswi.com (affiliated; no standalone Rio Transport site)
fit_notes: NOT a school-bus tuck-in target. Either a small motor-vehicle property hauler (FMCSA) or NEMT/senior-transport arm tied to Senior Express WI. No school district contracts; no yellow-bus fleet. Skip.

name: E Providence Transfer Inc

districts_or_customers: East Providence/Riverside RI area; not listed in RIDE or East Providence Public Schools transportation contracts
website: No confirmed company website (source data field was incorrect - points to city of East Providence)

name: Charity Transport LLC

principals: Founder names not publicly disclosed on company site (founder photo only)
founded_year: ~2014-2015 (10+ years in business per site, FMCSA USDOT 4317883)
fleet_size_est: Very small (FMCSA reports 1 power unit / 1 driver as of latest filing; likely under-reported - company markets 24/7 stretcher/wheelchair/ambulatory service)
service_types: Non-emergency medical transport (NEMT), wheelchair, stretcher, ambulatory, companion transport, home health care; NO school bus / SPED service
districts_or_customers: Hampton Roads VA - Norfolk, Virginia Beach, Chesapeake, Hampton, Newport News, Williamsburg, Portsmouth; healthcare/Medicaid clientele
recent_news: None recent; SWAM-certified, veteran-owned status touted on website
fit_notes: NOT a school-bus tuck-in. NEMT/home-health focused; intrastate-only property classification per FMCSA; no school district contracts. Outside Summit's school transportation scope. Skip.

name: Quality Transport Nemt
service_types: Non-emergency medical transport (NEMT) only - elderly, disabled, special needs, dialysis, hospice; serves healthcare systems, hospice, SNFs, assisted living. NO school bus/SPED route service
districts_or_customers: Healthcare facilities across the Carolinas; locations in Salisbury and Hickory NC; intrastate non-hazmat carrier
recent_news: 32 years of operation (per company site); no M&A activity found
fit_notes: NOT a school-bus tuck-in target. Pure NEMT operator serving healthcare/hospice/SNF clients - no school district contracts and no yellow-bus fleet. Outside Summit's core student-transport scope. Skip.

name: Northwest Limo

districts_or_customers: Teaneck / Bergen County NJ area; no school district contracts identified
website: northwestlimo.com (the site at that URL returns Cleveland-area limo content, suggesting either site mismatch or domain repurposing; no NJ Northwest Limo web presence confirmed)
